callToAction.subtitle: Find the best offers in DRC and elsewhere

left.title: QUESTIONS
left.subtitle: Frequently asked questions
left.text: We look forward to hearing from you.

right.question: What does ITM stand for?
right.response: Initially, ITM stood for 'International Training and Motivation', but over time ITM has come to mean simply ITM

right.question: What other services does ITM offer?
right.response: ITM offers services in personnel placement, recruitment, training, payroll, team building, etc.

right.question: Why should you choose ITM?
right.response: ITM has a proven reputation. Our efficiency and professionalism drive us to seek the best for our stakeholders.

right.question: How do I find your offers?
right.response: We regularly publish our vacancies on our Talent Pro recruitment platform and on our various social networks.

right.question: Where are ITM's headquarters?
right.response: Based in the Democratic Republic of Congo, our head office is located in Lubumbashi.

right.question: How can I contact you?
right.response: To get in touch with us, please refer to the contact information on our contact page.

footer.text: Keep up to date with the latest features and versions by joining our newsletter.

items.title: WELCOME TO ITM HR
items.paragraph: ITM HR is your strategic partner in HR solutions in Africa. With a proven track record of managing over 15,000 employees in 18 countries, we tailor our services—from recruitment and employee management to training and HR compliance—to fit your specific needs. Whether you're looking to enhance operational efficiency or elevate your talent strategy, we have the expertise to help you succeed.

items.title: WELCOME TO ITM HR
items.paragraph: ITM HR is your strategic partner in HR solutions in Africa. With a proven track record of managing over 15,000 employees in 18 countries, we tailor our services—from recruitment and employee management to training and HR compliance—to fit your specific needs. Whether you're looking to enhance operational efficiency or elevate your talent strategy, we have the expertise to help you succeed.

about.title: WHO ARE WE ?
about.subtitle: ITM HR
about.paragraph: ITM HR is a leading provider of Human Resource solutions, offering tailored services across 18 countries in Africa. We specialize in recruitment, payroll management, performance optimization, and employee training, helping businesses enhance their workforce and operational efficiency. As part of ITM Holding, we leverage the resources and expertise of a pan-African conglomerate to deliver compliant and effective solutions that support long-term business success. With a strong focus on operational excellence and employee development, ITM HR is your trusted partner for sustainable growth.

services.title: WHAT WE DO
services.subtitle: HR Solutions Built to Elevate Your Business
services.paragraph: From recruitment to workforce development, we deliver customized services that improve performance and drive your business forward.

metrics.title: Why Partner with Us?
metrics.paragraph: Because we provide strategic HR solutions tailored to your business, backed by deep local expertise and a commitment to excellence. Whether you're expanding across borders or optimizing locally, we are your trusted partner for navigating the complexities of people management.

metricsItems.title: Successful Placements Monthly
metricsItems.description: We consistently connect businesses with top talent to meet their evolving needs.

metricsItems.title: Professionals Under Our Care
metricsItems.description: From HR management to compliance, we handle your workforce so you can focus on growth.

metricsItems.title: Countries of Expertise
metricsItems.description: With a strong presence across Africa, we offer deep local insights and a global perspective.

metricsItems.title: Trusted Business Partners
metricsItems.description: Companies rely on us for HR solutions that drive performance and success.

partners.title: Our partners
partners.subtitle: We are the choice of over 700 satisfied companies; join us and benefit from our expertise.

testimonies.title: What our customers say about us

banner.title: ABOUT US
banner.subtitle: Thanks to cutting-edge technologies, we offer flexible, scalable HR solutions adapted to all business sectors, guaranteeing optimal responsiveness and sustainable performance.

about.title: OUR GROUP
about.description: Founded in 2011, ITM Holding is a pan-African conglomerate comprising 9 companies operating across 18 countries, including the Democratic Republic of the Congo, Congo, Zambia, Angola, South Africa, Tanzania, Kenya, Uganda, Rwanda, Burundi, Nigeria, Cameroon, Gabon, Benin, Togo, Côte d'Ivoire, Senegal, and Germany. With investments in sectors such as Human Resources, mining, financial services, logistics, and contact centers, ITM Holding’s mission is to drive economic growth while empowering communities throughout Africa. Our vision is to provide innovative, sustainable solutions that transform industries and create lasting value. Grounded in excellence, integrity, and social responsibility, ITM Holding continues to expand its impact across the continent, shaping a brighter future for businesses and the communities they serve.

items.question: Our history
items.response: ITM, founded in DR Congo in 2011, started as a training and staff management company. Today, ITM Holding operates in 18 countries with over 15,000 employees across various industries.

items.question: What makes us different
items.response: With operations in 18 countries, we have an unmatched understanding of local markets, cultures, and regulations, enabling us to deliver region-specific solutions that work.

items.question: What defines us
items.response: Committed to excellence, integrity, and social responsibility, we strive to redefine industry standards, drive economic growth, and empower communities on the continent through the provision of quality goods and services.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.text: Driving sustainable growth and operational excellence for all our stakeholders

vision.title: Our vision
vision.text: Building a successful future for all

right.text: ITM has a proven track record of successful placements, satisfied customers and years of industry experience. Our online recruitment dashboard revolutionizes the way job seekers find opportunities and recruiters connect with top talent.

recruiting.title: Successful Placements Monthly
recruiting.description: We consistently connect businesses with top talent to meet their evolving needs.

agents.title: Professionals Under Our Care
agents.description: From HR management to compliance, we handle your workforce so you can focus on growth.

country.title: Countries of Expertise
country.description: With a strong presence across Africa, we offer deep local insights and a global perspective.

company.title: Trusted Business Partners
company.description: Companies rely on us for HR solutions that drive performance and success.

banner.title: Discover our services
banner.subtitle: From recruitment management to training, skills development and labor relations, we're with you every step of the way. Thanks to our expertise in human resources, you can optimize your processes, improve the efficiency of your teams and boost your performance.

about.title: WHAT WE DO
about.subtitle: We provide exclusive services for your business
about.paragraph: Looking for talent? We can help you find the profiles best suited to your needs. We support you at every stage of your human resources management: recruitment, training, skills development, labor relations...
about.paragraph2: Our expertise in human resources enables you to improve the efficiency and performance of your teams.

banner.title: Do you have any questions?
banner.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you, so contact us and we'll help you find your dream job or dream team today.

We specialize in recruitment, payroll management, performance optimization, and employee training, helping businesses enhance their workforce and operational efficiency. As part of ITM Holding, we leverage the resources and expertise of a pan-African conglomerate to deliver compliant and effective solutions that support long-term business success. With a strong focus on operational excellence and employee development, ITM Togo is your trusted partner for sustainable growth.

aboutEntity.title: WHAT TO KNOW ABOUT ITM SARL
aboutEntity.description: We provide exclusive services for your business
aboutEntity.paragraph1: Founded in 2011, ITM SARL started out as a company specializing in Personnel Management, Recruitment and Training. We have expanded our field of expertise to cover all HR support services. With over 10,000 employees in 5 regions in the DRC, we offer services tailored to our customers' needs, enabling them to achieve their business objectives. Our approach combines innovation and expertise, with the right balance of youth and experience to create a dynamic team ready to respond to the most specific requirements.
aboutEntity.paragraph2: Thanks to state-of-the-art technologies, we offer flexible, scalable HR solutions adapted to all business sectors, guaranteeing optimal responsiveness and sustainable performance.

about.title: WHO ARE WE ?
about.subtitle: ITM AFRICA LTD.
about.paragraph: Since 2017, ITM Rwanda has been a trusted leader in workforce management and business solutions. Supporting over 1,000 staff, the company provides personalized solutions that make a real difference for organizations. Our expertise includes talent acquisition, HR management, and payroll solutions, enabling businesses to streamline operations and focus on success. From recruitment to payroll management, ITM Rwanda simplifies workforce management, allowing businesses to focus on growth. Partnering with ITM Rwanda means building a stronger future for businesses in Rwanda and beyond.

aboutEntity.description: We provide exclusive services for your business
aboutEntity.paragraph1: ITM Rwanda has been a trusted leader in shaping the future of workforce management and business solutions in Rwanda since 2017. As an integral part of ITM’s extensive pan-African presence, we provide customized services that drive business growth and operational excellence. Our expertise spans strategic talent acquisition, comprehensive human resource management, and cutting-edge payroll solutions, empowering businesses to reach their full potential. ITM Rwanda has been a trusted partner in workforce management in Rwanda since 2017. As part of ITM’s pan-African network and with over 1,000 staff under our management, we provide tailored solutions that drive business growth and guarantee operational efficiency.
aboutEntity.paragraph2: Our expertise spans talent acquisition, HR management, and advanced payroll solutions, helping businesses streamline operations and focus on what matters most. We are your go-to partner for strategic HR solutions, empowering businesses to achieve sustainable success in Rwanda and beyond.

about.title: WHO ARE WE ?
about.subtitle: ITM KENYA LTD.
about.paragraph: ITM Kenya, a member of the ITM Group founded in 2023, is a trusted provider of professional Human Resources (HR) services. We specialize in delivering tailored HR solutions designed to help businesses streamline their workforce management, enhance employee engagement, and achieve organizational success. As part of the globally recognized ITM Group, ITM Kenya is committed to excellence and innovation, empowering organizations across the region with comprehensive HR services that drive growth and efficiency.

about.title: WHO ARE WE ?
about.subtitle: ITM KATOPE PTY
about.paragraph: ITM Katope PTY has been a trusted leader in people management since 2017. As part of ITM’s global footprint, we specialize in HR outsourcing, Employer of Record (EOR) services, recruitment, placement, and call center operations. Our focus extends to addressing one of South Africa’s most pressing challenges: youth unemployment. Through our youth development initiatives, we empower young people by offering job placements, skills development, and career mentorship, giving them a brighter future.

aboutEntity.title: WHAT TO KNOW ABOUT ITM SOUTH AFRICA
aboutEntity.description: We provide exclusive services for your business
aboutEntity.paragraph1: ITM Katope South Africa has been a trusted leader in people management since 2017. As part of ITM’s global footprint, we specialize in HR outsourcing, Employer of Record (EOR) services, recruitment, placement, and call center operations. Our focus extends to addressing one of South Africa’s most pressing challenges: youth unemployment. Through our youth development initiatives, we empower young people by offering job placements, skills development, and career mentorship, giving them a brighter future.
aboutEntity.paragraph2: In addition to our comprehensive HR and people management services, we are proud of our vibrant, modern call center operations, serving clients across industries with inbound and outbound support. Our dedication to innovation and excellence in service delivery sets us apart in the market. Join us as we drive change, uplift communities, and redefine HR solutions in South Africa and beyond!

aboutEntity.description: We provide exclusive services for your business
aboutEntity.paragraph1: ITM Nigeria has been Nigeria’s leading provider of innovative human resource solutions since 2019. As a vital part of ITM’s pan-African presence, we offer a comprehensive range of HR services, including talent acquisition, capacity building, employee management, and retention strategies, tailored to meet the specific needs of businesses.
aboutEntity.paragraph2: Our focus is on helping organizations enhance their performance by equipping them with the right tools and talent to foster growth and remain competitive in today’s dynamic business environment. Through our services, we support businesses in developing their workforce, improving workplace culture, and driving sustainable success. At ITM Nigeria, we take pride in our commitment to excellence, integrity, and client satisfaction. Our reputation for delivering high-value services has earned us the trust of businesses seeking to thrive in Nigeria’s competitive marketplace.

about.title: WHO ARE WE ?
about.subtitle: ITM BENIN
about.paragraph: Founded in 2022, ITM BENIN, a subsidiary of the ITM HOLDING group, is an essential reference in human resources management. Our services range from simple HR consulting to recruitment of local or expatriate personnel (EOR); Placement and management of personnel (outsourcing); Payroll management: outsourcing and payroll calculation, Team building, Drafting of local or expatriate employment contracts. We have a varied catalog of innovative training courses that we tailor to your company's needs. As a strategic partner and through our supervision services, we help our customers to create working environments where employees can flourish, while maximizing their performance and commitment.

aboutEntity.title: WHAT TO KNOW ABOUT ITM BENIN?
aboutEntity.description: We provide exclusive services for your business
aboutEntity.paragraph1: ITM Benin has rapidly established itself as a major player in human resources management since its creation in 2022. As a subsidiary of the pan-African ITM Group, we offer comprehensive HR solutions tailored to the specific needs of companies in all sectors.
aboutEntity.paragraph2: We specialize in the recruitment of local and expatriate staff (EOR), the placement and management of outsourced personnel, as well as outsourced payroll management. Our catalog of innovative training courses enables companies to develop their teams' skills and maintain their competitiveness in a constantly changing environment. Our solutions are designed to improve business performance while ensuring compliance with market best practices. Today, ITM Benin manages nearly 2,000 outsourced employees, operating in a variety of sectors including industry, telephony, energy and catering. As a strategic partner, we help our customers create work environments where employees can flourish while maximizing their engagement and productivity.
